title: astragalus tatsienensis var. incanus
intro: Astragalus tatsienensis var. incanus, also known as the incanous astragalus, is a type of plant in the legume family native to China. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant has been traditionally used to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus tatsienensis var. incanus is often prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or capsule, and is used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
